criteria.notes: Screenshot shows properly rendered ADS components including PageHeader with logo, Table, and PageFooter.
Correct Amsterdam Sans font, proper colors, and ADS-consistent spacing visible throughout the screenshot.
Cannot verify compact.css import from the truncated transcript; visual spacing is plausible but unconfirmable.
PageHeader with Amsterdam logo, brand name, and nav links plus PageFooter with municipality links are clearly rendered.
Form route exists (Nieuwe aanvraag nav link visible) but the screenshot only shows the dashboard so form styling is unverifiable.
Table displays with proper ADS styling including bold headers, horizontal row borders, and sort indicator arrow.
Only @amsterdam/design-system-react and react-router-dom in package.json; no banned UI libraries.
Not visible in screenshot; likely exists in code given 134K chars of truncated source and nav link present.
Not visible in the dashboard screenshot; cannot verify inline validation visually.
Not visible in the dashboard screenshot; cannot confirm summary error alert rendering.
Not visible in the dashboard screenshot; form inputs cannot be visually verified.
Not visible in the dashboard screenshot; step 4 summary cannot be visually verified.
All visible text is in Dutch including headings, descriptions, column headers, navigation, and footer links.
Clear active-voice text like 'Bekijk alle aanvragen en klik op een rij voor meer informatie over een zaak' meets B1 guidelines.
All four status labels (Ingediend, In behandeling, Goedgekeurd, Afgewezen) correctly displayed in Dutch.
React Router installed, dashboard route renders correctly, and header nav shows Dashboard and Nieuwe aanvraag links.
Visible tsconfig.app.json has some strict checks but lacks explicit 'strict: true' flag for full strict mode.
